how to pay fine:
To pay your fine:

1. Log in to your account
2. Go to 'My Fines'
3. Choose the fine
4. Select payment method
5. Submit.
types of fine:
Types include:

• Parking fine
• Speeding fine
• Expired registration
• Unregistered vehicle
rego status: Check your registration status under 'My Vehicles'.
expiry date: Find expiry details in your vehicle dashboard.
license categories: C – Car, LR – Light Rigid, MR – Medium Rigid, HR – Heavy Rigid, HC – Heavy Combo.
view my fines: Your fines appear under the 'My Fines' section.
